# Nightshift

> Nightshift is a mostly static studio website for systems-first game worlds, devlogs, project pages, and related AfterDarkRP surfaces.

This file helps LLMs and coding agents quickly understand the public site and where source content lives.

## Site

- Canonical domain: https://ns-tx.com/
- Home: https://ns-tx.com/
- Games: https://ns-tx.com/pages/games.html
- Studio: https://ns-tx.com/pages/studio.html
- Devlog: https://ns-tx.com/pages/DevLog/index.html
- Contact: https://ns-tx.com/pages/contact.html

## Important Pages

- Game index: `/pages/games.html`
- Game detail pages: `/pages/games/barn.html`, `/pages/games/elder.html`, `/pages/games/hair.html`, `/pages/games/hook.html`, `/pages/games/saint.html`, `/pages/games/spear.html`
- Studio pages: `/pages/studio.html`, `/pages/Studio/Donations.html`, `/pages/Studio/Landsnap.html`
- Service pages: `/pages/development.html`, `/pages/websites.html`
- AfterDarkRP surface: `/afterdarkrp/index.html`
- AfterDarkRP sections: `/afterdarkrp/about/index.html`, `/afterdarkrp/guide/index.html`, `/afterdarkrp/rules/index.html`, `/afterdarkrp/changelog/index.html`

## Editable Source Map

- Main hand-authored pages: `index.html`, `pages/*.html`, `pages/games/*.html`, `afterdarkrp/**/*.html`
- Shared styles: `styles/*.css`
- Devlog markdown source: `content/devlog/*.md`
- Devlog generator: `tools/devlog/build.mjs`
- React/Vite source: `react-app/src/`
- Static media: `images/`, `video/`, `audio/`, `models/`

## Generated Or Build Outputs

Do not edit these by hand:

- `pages/DevLog/index.html`
- `pages/DevLog/posts/*.html`
- `dist/`
- `node_modules/`

For devlog changes, edit `content/devlog/*.md` or `tools/devlog/build.mjs`, then run:

```sh
npm run build:devlog
```

For React/Vite changes, edit `react-app/src/`, then run:

```sh
npm run build:react
```

## Design Language

- Dark, high-contrast, atmospheric Nightshift presentation.
- Green phosphor accents with restrained red warning accents.
- Display typography uses Chakra Petch.
- Body typography uses IBM Plex Mono.
- Preferred motifs: panels, grids, scanlines, control-room UI framing, dense readable technical layouts.
- Copy should be direct, technical, and slightly cinematic without becoming vague marketing filler.

## Agent Notes

- Read `AGENTS.md` before making design or layout changes.
- Read `AGENT_CONTEXT.md` for repo navigation, source ownership, and verification steps.
- Preserve relative-path correctness. This site uses a mix of root-relative and nested relative links.
- Keep shared visual tokens centralized when a pattern is reused across pages.
